scripts.dev: npm run build -w @strudel-collab/shared && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n server,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w @strudel-collab/server" "npm run dev -w @strudel-collab/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @strudel-collab/shared && npm run build -w @strudel-collab/server && npm run build -w @strudel-collab/web
